method: plateau-departure threshold: first offered rate with signal > 1.5x low-rate plateau median (plateau = median of 2 lowest-rate points = 0.167489), sustained through the top of the sweep; kneedle-style max-curvature cross-check agrees (cross-check point 4/6). Resolution limited to sweep-point spacing; assumes plateau-then-degrade shape; no extrapolation past the knee
